---
title: "test_dedupe_corrections_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_dedupe_corrections_empire.py"
loc: 16
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.95
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.66
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_dedupe_script_execution, test_json_dedupe_logic. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)

### Exports
- `test_dedupe_script_execution`
- `test_json_dedupe_logic`
